metadata.title: Checklist
metadata.description: Combines checklists across pages into users sidebar

regex.source: .setDesc('e.g. "todo" will match #todo. You may add mutliple tags separated by a newline. Leave empty to capture all')
regex.target: .setDesc('例如，"todo" 将匹配 #todo。您可以添加多个标签，用换行分隔。留空则捕获所有标签')

regex.source: .setDesc("Show all items in file if tag is present, or only items attached to the block where the tag is located. Only has an effect if Tag Name is not empty")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果存在标签，则显示文件中所有项目；否则仅显示标签所在块中的项目。仅当标签名称不为空时生效")

regex.source: .setDesc("Time sorts are based on last time the file for a particular item was edited")
regex.target: .setDesc("时间排序基于特定项目所在文件的最后编辑时间")

regex.source: .setDesc("Time sorts are based on last time the file for the newest or oldest item in a group was edited")
regex.target: .setDesc("时间排序基于分组中最新或最旧项目所在文件的最后编辑时间")

regex.source: .setDesc("Include all files that match this glob pattern. Examples on plugin page/github readme. Leave empty to check all files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("包含所有匹配此glob模式的文件。示例见插件页面/github说明文档。留空则检查所有文件")

regex.source: .setDesc(`It's recommended to leave this on unless you are expereince performance issues due to a large vault. You can then reload manually using the "Checklist: refresh" command`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`建议保持开启，除非因笔记库过大导致性能问题。此时您可以使用"待办清单：刷新"命令手动重新加载`)
